tasks.prompt: Dockerfile yoz: FROM python:3-alpine, EXPOSE 8000, CMD ["python","-m","http.server","8000"] — va 'examapp' qur.
tasks.check: grep -qi '^FROM python' $EXAM/Dockerfile && docker image inspect examapp >/dev/null 2>&1

tasks.prompt: examapp ni 8086 portда ishga tushir (-d --name examweb -p 8086:8000) va curl bilan javobini 'out.txt' ga yoz.
'docker-compose.yml' yoz: web servisi build: . va ports: 8087:8000 bo'lsin.
examweb konteynerini to'xtatib o'chir (docker rm -f examweb).
